observations.evidence: 03-fastgpt-mcp-tools.png shows ragflow_retrieval parsed with the PAS dataset id in the tool description.
RAGFlow MCP runtime _DATASET_PAGE_SIZE had to be changed from 1000 to 100 because RAGFlow /datasets rejects page_size > 100.
chatTest creates Human/AI chat items, but chat_item_responses and llm_request_records stay empty; RAGFlow MCP receives no new /mcp call.

decision: Use PAS direct RAGFlow API/KB for E3; keep FastGPT MCP as optional future POC.
